name: Weekly Team Meeting
author: Mohsin
description:
This app is designed for internal team meetings focused on assessing project health, tracking progress toward goals, and ensuring team alignment. It emphasizes accountability, milestone tracking, and addressing challenges collaboratively across any department or function.

## Use this app when the transcript contains:
- Multiple team members discussing ongoing projects or initiatives
- Progress updates on tasks, deliverables, or strategic objectives
- Discussion of blockers, challenges, or issues requiring resolution
- Task assignments with clear ownership and accountability
- Performance metrics, costs, timelines, or progress indicators
- Strategic discussions about project direction and priorities
- Review of completed work and upcoming goals
- Internal team coordination and planning

## Key indicators in transcript:
- References to "we," "our team," "our project," "our goals"
- Updates on what's been completed versus what's in progress
- Mentions of tasks, deadlines, milestones, or deliverables
- Problem-solving discussions about obstacles or roadblocks
- Metrics, KPIs, budgets, or performance tracking
- Assignment of responsibilities to specific team members
- Discussion of achievements, wins, or completed objectives

## Do NOT use this app when:
- Meeting is one-on-one (coaching, performance review, 1:1 check-in)
- Primary focus is client/customer-facing (sales calls, client updates, demos)
- Meeting is purely social or personal
- Focus is on brainstorming/ideation without concrete progress tracking
- External stakeholder meetings (investor pitches, partnership discussions)
- Training or educational sessions
- Ceremonial or all-hands company meetings

## App Best Suited For:
Sprint reviews, weekly syncs, project check-ins, team standups, departmental meetings, cross-functional updates, and any recurring team meeting focused on progress and accountability.

name: 1 to 1 Meeting
author: Mohsin
description:
This app is designed for one-on-one meetings between a manager and their direct report, or between any two individuals working closely together. It emphasizes individual priorities, personal development, mutual feedback, and accountability for individual goals and challenges.

## Use this app when the transcript contains:
- Conversation between exactly two people (manager-employee, peer-to-peer, mentor-mentee)
- Discussion of individual work priorities, tasks, or projects
- Personal challenges, blockers, or concerns affecting one person's work
- Individual achievements, completed tasks, or recent wins
- Career development, growth, or skill-building discussions
- Feedback exchange (both directions)
- Personal work style, preferences, or working relationship discussions
- Individual action items and commitments
- Check-ins on well-being, workload, or work-life balance

## Key indicators in transcript:
- Two-person dialogue format
- Personal pronouns focused on individual experience ("I'm working on," "my challenge is")
- Discussion of individual performance, growth, or development
- Feedback about working style, communication, or collaboration
- Career aspirations, skill development, or learning goals
- Individual blockers or challenges (not team-wide issues)
- Personal accountability and commitment statements
- Discussion of relationship dynamics between the two participants
- Individual workload, priorities, or time management

## Do NOT use this app when:
- Meeting involves three or more active participants
- Focus is on team-wide progress, goals, or coordination
- Primary purpose is project status updates for a team
- Meeting is a performance review or formal evaluation (use dedicated performance review template)
- Client-facing or external stakeholder meeting
- Group brainstorming or planning session
- All-hands, town hall, or company-wide meeting
- Training or onboarding session
- Interview or candidate evaluation

## App Best Suited For:
Weekly 1:1s, bi-weekly check-ins, manager-direct report meetings, peer coaching sessions, mentor-mentee conversations, and any recurring individual development conversations.

name: Quick Sync
author: Mohsin
description:
This app is designed for everyday work conversations that don't fit a specific meeting format. It captures informal discussions, quick syncs, ad-hoc problem-solving sessions, and spontaneous work-related conversations in a flexible structure that adapts to whatever was actually discussed.

## Use this app when the transcript contains:
- Informal or unstructured work conversations between colleagues
- Quick syncs or check-ins without a formal agenda
- Ad-hoc problem-solving or troubleshooting discussions
- Spontaneous brainstorming or idea exploration about work topics
- Mixed work topics that don't follow a specific meeting pattern
- Casual updates or information sharing between team members
- Exploratory discussions about potential projects or ideas
- Quick decision-making conversations about work matters
- Follow-up discussions on ongoing work without formal structure
- Water cooler conversations that include work-related content

## Key indicators in transcript:
- No clear meeting agenda or structure, but work-focused
- Conversational, informal tone about professional matters
- Work topics emerge organically and may shift multiple times
- Quick decisions or clarifications about work
- Spontaneous idea generation related to projects or tasks
- No formal roles (presenter, facilitator, etc.)
- Natural back-and-forth dialogue about work matters
- May include tangents but stays work-relevant
- Could be 2+ people having an organic work conversation

## Do NOT use this app when:
- Meeting has a clear structure and predefined agenda (use Team Progress Meeting or 1:1 Meeting templates)
- Conversation is purely personal/social with no work content (use General Conversation)
- Formal presentation or demo being given
- Client-facing or sales conversations with clear objectives
- Interview or candidate screening
- Training or educational session with curriculum
- Performance review or evaluation

## App Best Suited For:
Hallway conversations, Slack huddles, quick Zoom calls, coffee chats with work discussion, spontaneous problem-solving sessions, casual team syncs, and any unstructured work-related conversation worth capturing.

name: Personal Chat
author: Mohsin
description:
This app is designed for everyday conversations of any kind - personal, social, hobby-related, planning, or casual discussions. It captures informal dialogues and mixed-topic conversations in a flexible structure that adapts to whatever was actually discussed, whether it's planning a trip, discussing hobbies, catching up with friends, or family conversations.

## Use this app when the transcript contains:
- Personal or social conversations
- Casual catch-ups with friends or family
- Hobby or interest discussions
- Personal planning (trips, events, activities)
- Mixed topics that don't follow a specific pattern
- Conversations blending multiple personal subjects
- Updates on personal life, interests, or activities
- Exploratory discussions about personal ideas or plans
- Natural back-and-forth dialogue on varied non-work subjects
- Advice-seeking or problem-solving for personal matters

## Key indicators in transcript:
- No formal structure or agenda
- Conversational, casual tone
- Topics emerge organically and may shift multiple times
- Personal or social content (not work-related)
- Natural dialogue flow
- Mix of different personal subjects or themes
- Spontaneous idea generation about personal matters
- No formal roles or structure
- Could be 2+ people having an organic personal conversation
- May include tangents or topic changes
- Casual, everyday language

## Do NOT use this app when:
- Conversation is work-focused (use Informal Work Discussion)
- Meeting has clear structure with predefined sections (use specific templates)
- Formal meeting or structured discussion of any kind

## App Best Suited For:
Casual conversations with friends/family, hobby discussions, personal planning sessions, catch-up calls, social meetups, personal interest explorations, life updates, and any unstructured personal conversation worth capturing.

name: Twitter
author: Omi Team
description: Simply say "Tweet Now" and then say your tweet out loud. Watch your tweet get magically posted on your profile!

chat_tools.name: post_tweet
chat_tools.description: Post a new tweet to Twitter/X. Use this when the user wants to tweet something, post an update, or share on Twitter.

chat_tools.name: get_timeline
chat_tools.description: Get the user's home timeline with recent tweets. Use this when the user wants to see their feed, check what's happening, or view recent tweets.

max_results.description: Number of tweets to return (default: 10, max: 100)

chat_tools.name: get_my_tweets
chat_tools.description: Get the user's own recent tweets. Use this when the user wants to see their own tweets, check what they've posted, or view their tweet history.

max_results.description: Number of tweets to return (default: 10, max: 100)

chat_tools.name: get_mentions
chat_tools.description: Get tweets that mention the user. Use this when the user wants to see who mentioned them, check notifications, or see replies.

max_results.description: Number of mentions to return (default: 10, max: 100)

chat_tools.name: search_tweets
chat_tools.description: Search for tweets about a topic. Use this when the user wants to find tweets about something, search Twitter, or see what people are saying.

chat_tools.name: like_tweet
chat_tools.description: Like a tweet. Use this when the user wants to like a specific tweet.

tweet_id.description: ID of the tweet to like. Required.

chat_tools.name: unlike_tweet
chat_tools.description: Remove a like from a tweet. Use this when the user wants to unlike a tweet.

tweet_id.description: ID of the tweet to unlike. Required.

chat_tools.name: retweet
chat_tools.description: Retweet a tweet. Use this when the user wants to retweet or share a tweet.

tweet_id.description: ID of the tweet to retweet. Required.

chat_tools.name: delete_tweet
chat_tools.description: Delete one of the user's tweets. Use this when the user wants to remove or delete their tweet.

tweet_id.description: ID of the tweet to delete. Required.

chat_tools.name: get_user_profile
chat_tools.description: Get a Twitter user's profile information. Use this when the user wants to look up someone on Twitter or see profile details.

username.description: Twitter username (without @). If not provided, returns the authenticated user's profile.

name: GitHub
author: Omi Team
description: Just say “Feedback Post” or “Create Issue” and have your feedback magically posted as a GitHub issue in your selected repo!

chat_tools.name: create_issue
chat_tools.description: Create a GitHub issue in a repository. Use this when the user wants to report a bug, request a feature, create a ticket, or log feedback. The issue will be created in the user's default repository unless a different repo is specified.

title.description: The issue title. Required. Keep it concise and descriptive (under 100 characters).

repo.description: Repository to create the issue in (format: 'owner/repo'). If not provided, uses the user's default repository.

body.description: The issue description/body. Supports markdown formatting. Include relevant details like steps to reproduce, expected behavior, etc.

auto_labels.description: If true (default), use AI to automatically select appropriate labels from the repository's available labels based on the issue content.

labels.description: Labels to apply to the issue. If provided, must exactly match labels that exist in the repository.

chat_tools.name: code_feature
chat_tools.description: Implement a feature in a GitHub repository using an external coding agent (Cursor Agent or Devin). Use this when the user asks to 'code', 'implement', 'add feature', 'build', or 'create code' in a repository. The agent will explore the codebase, understand existing patterns, and generate proper code. Set merge=true if the user explicitly asks to merge the changes (e.g., 'code and merge', 'implement and merge it').

repo.description: Repository to code in (format: 'owner/repo'). If not provided, uses the user's default repository.

merge.description: Whether to automatically merge the PR after creating it. Only set to true if the user explicitly asks to merge (e.g., 'merge it', 'merge the changes', 'apply it directly'). Default is false.

feature.description: Description of the feature to implement. Be specific about what needs to be built or changed.

chat_tools.status_message: Agent is exploring your repo and coding...

chat_tools.name: list_repos

name: Board meeting transcriber
author: Joshua
description:
You are BoardScribe, a professional, neutral, and discreet board-meeting scribing agent.Your tasks: transcribe (when given audio or ASR text), identify speakers and timestamps (if available), produce a concise executive summary, full Minutes of Meeting (MOM), and a prioritized, timestamped Action Items list suitable for follow-up. Be precise, factual, and neutral; do not invent facts. If something is unclear or unintelligible, mark it as [INAUDIBLE] and include the timestamp if available.

Behavior rules:
Always produce two outputs: (A) Human-readable meeting package (summary, MOM, action items, decisions, attendees, next meeting) and (B) Machine-friendly JSON following the schema below.
Keep executive summary ≤ 6 sentences; keep each action item to one sentence with clear owner, due date (if stated), priority, and status (open by default).
Extract explicit decisions and votes; when no explicit vote, summarize the decision and say whether unanimous / consensus / not stated.
Preserve confidentiality: do not include private personal data beyond attendees’ names and titles unless explicitly provided.
Speaker labels: prefer given participant names; if not available, use Speaker 1, Speaker 2, etc., and preserve speaker-turn order.
Timestamps: if audio or timestamps present, attach timestamps to key items and action items.
Format MOM chronologically by agenda item and tag each section with the related agenda heading if available.
When asked, produce follow-up email text and a short meeting subject line (≤10 words).
If the audio/transcript is partial, produce output with a confidence score (low/medium/high) and highlight gaps.
Output must be in English unless otherwise specified.

Quality & style:
Professional, concise, and neutral tone.
Use bullet points for MOM and action items.
Use ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD) when normalizing dates.
Prioritize action items and decisions at the top.

Stop.

name: Rizz Meter
author: Zixun Wang
description:
💬 Rizz Meter for Dates — Real Conversations, Real Connection
Ever walked away from a date wondering how it really went?
Rizz Meter for Dates helps you grow—not by judging you, but by reflecting how you made the other person feel.
Using cutting-edge conversation analysis and a touch of AI intuition, Rizz Meter listens to the flow of your chat and turns it into insight you can feel good about. After each date, you’ll get a beautiful “Rizz Report” that celebrates your best moments and gently nudges you toward warmer, more balanced conversations.
✨ What It Does
Reciprocity & Flow: Measures how evenly you both share the floor—talking and listening in rhythm.
Attentiveness: Catches those magic follow-ups that show you remembered what they said and cared to ask more.
Warmth & Positivity: Detects appreciation, laughter, and kindness in your words, highlighting emotional openness.
Comfort & Pacing: Analyzes pauses and tone stability to sense if the conversation felt natural and unhurried.
Boundary Respect: Recognizes when you gracefully switch topics and respect a “no.”
Chemistry Index: Tracks how often your smiles, jokes, and energy aligned—when the vibe clicked.
💡 Your Post-Date Rizz Report
After each conversation, you’ll receive:
A Date Rizz Score out of 100
Sub-scores for warmth, attentiveness, reciprocity, comfort, and chemistry
2 personalized highlights celebrating what went great
2 gentle, practical tips to make your next date feel even better
Example:
“Date Rizz 78. Strong: balanced turns and genuine laughter. Try: longer pauses after jokes and echo their last story before switching topics.”
❤ Why It Matters
Because chemistry isn’t luck—it’s listening, warmth, and respect.
Rizz Meter for Dates helps you notice the small, human details that build trust and attraction, one conversation at a time.

name: ArcheVoice
author: Stan
description:
ArcheVoice is a smart app for speech analysis that helps you understand your inner archetypes and emotional patterns. The app transcribes your speech and automatically identifies which archetypes are present in each segment, highlighting key verbal markers, emotional tone, and typical thoughts.

With ArcheVoice, you can:

Get a detailed analysis of your own speech or others’.

Identify dominant and rare archetype expressions.

Understand the emotional tone and nuances of communication.

Use key phrases for self-development, coaching, or psychological analysis.

Features:

Automatic audio transcription.

Recognition of 12 classic archetypes.

Detailed analysis of verbal markers, thoughts, and emotions.

Summary table with percentages of archetype expressions and emotional tone.

Intuitive interface and visualized results.

Who is it for:

Psychologists and coaches working with personality and communication.

HR specialists and team development professionals.

Anyone interested in self-discovery and personal growth.

Slogan:
“Understand yourself and others through voice”

chat_tools.name: get_analytics
chat_tools.description: Get store analytics and sales data from Shopify. Use this when the user asks about their store performance, sales, revenue, orders count, or analytics. Supports preset periods OR custom date ranges. For BFCM, specific dates like 'Nov 28 to Dec 2', or any custom range, use start_date and end_date parameters.

end_date.description: Custom end date for analytics. Formats: '2024-12-02', 'Dec 2, 2024', '12/02/2024'. Use with start_date for custom ranges.

period.description: Preset time period: 'today', 'yesterday', 'last_7_days', 'last_30_days', 'this_month', 'last_month', 'this_year'. Ignored if start_date/end_date are provided.

start_date.description: Custom start date for analytics. Formats: '2024-11-28', 'Nov 28, 2024', '11/28/2024'. Use with end_date for custom ranges like BFCM.

chat_tools.name: get_orders
chat_tools.description: Get recent orders from the Shopify store. Use this when the user wants to see their orders, check recent sales, or list orders by status.

limit.description: Maximum number of orders to return (default: 10, max: 50)

status.description: Order status filter: 'any', 'open', 'closed', or 'cancelled'. Default is 'any'.

chat_tools.name: create_order

tags.description: Order tags - only if user asks

address_line1.description: Street address. REQUIRED with city, state, zip_code for shipping.

city.description: City. REQUIRED if address_line1 is provided.

discount_code.description: Discount/coupon code to apply. IMPORTANT: Always pass this if user mentions a coupon/code.

free_shipping.description: Set to true if user mentions free shipping. Auto-detected if discount code contains 'freeshipping'.

line_items.description: Array of items. Each item needs: title (product name), quantity (number). Example: [{"title": "Omi", "quantity": 3}]

customer_email.description: Customer's email address (required for new customers)

customer_name.description: Customer's full name (e.g., 'John Doe'). Will search existing customers.

zip_code.description: ZIP/Postal code. REQUIRED if address_line1 is provided.

state.description: State/Province (e.g., 'IN'). REQUIRED if address_line1 is provided.

note.description: Order note - only if user asks

description: Python BrainCoder is your on-demand Python coding assistant that transforms your spoken ideas into functional Python scripts. Whether you want to prototype a game, write a book generator, design an app, build useful tools, or tackle software engineering challenges, just describe what you want and BrainCoder instantly creates the code for you. Get code snippets, full scripts, and explanations tailored to your goals—all hands-free and conversational. Perfect for coders, learners, inventors, and anyone who wants to bring coding ideas to life instantly.

name: SetSync Pro
author: Arkadiusz
description: SetSync Pro is your intelligent on-set assistant for film productions, capturing every work detail in conversations across departments, workflows, equipment, shots/takes, call sheets, and schedules. It automatically extracts tasks—identifying assignees, deadlines, priorities, dependencies, and status—while continuously analyzing conversations for logical consistency, timeline conflicts, or responsibility overlap. SetSync Pro distinguishes facts, assumptions, and opinions, requesting sources for unverifiable claims to ensure data integrity. Optimize set coordination, prevent misunderstandings, and enable seamless, real-time tracking of your film set operations.

name: Linear
author: Omi Team
description: Manage your Linear issues with voice commands. Create issues, track work, update statuses, and add comments – all hands-free through your Omi device.

chat_tools.name: linear_create_issue
chat_tools.description: Create a new issue in Linear. Use this when the user wants to create a Linear task, ticket, issue, or bug report.

description.description: Detailed description of the Linear issue

chat_tools.name: linear_list_my_issues
chat_tools.description: List Linear issues assigned to the user. Use this when the user wants to see their Linear tasks, tickets, or assigned work.

limit.description: Maximum number of Linear issues to return (default: 10)

chat_tools.name: linear_list_recent_issues
chat_tools.description: List recent Linear issues in the workspace regardless of assignee. Use this when the user wants to see latest issues, recent tickets, or all new Linear issues.

limit.description: Maximum number of Linear issues to return (default: 5)

team.description: Optional team key to filter by (e.g., 'OMI', 'ENG')

chat_tools.name: linear_update_issue_status
chat_tools.description: Update the status of a Linear issue. Use this when the user wants to move a Linear task to a different status like 'In Progress' or 'Done'.

new_status.description: New status for the Linear issue (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Done', 'Backlog')

chat_tools.name: linear_search_issues
chat_tools.description: Search for issues in Linear. Use this when the user wants to find specific Linear issues or tasks by keyword.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5)

query.description: Search query - Linear issue title, description, or identifier

chat_tools.name: linear_get_issue
chat_tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Linear issue. Use this when the user asks about a particular Linear issue or wants to know its details.

chat_tools.name: linear_add_comment
chat_tools.description: Add a comment to an existing Linear issue. Use this when the user wants to comment on, note, or add information to a Linear issue.

comment.description: Comment text to add to the Linear issue

name: NEXUS AI Agent
author: kutti
description: NEXUS is your all-purpose AI agent designed for ultimate productivity and broad compatibility. Acting as your Master Control Program (MCP), NEXUS intelligently coordinates tools, apps, and services to help you manage tasks, extract insights, automate workflows, and answer any question. With powerful conversational abilities and advanced contextual awareness, NEXUS supports both real-time chat and deep analysis of your recorded conversations, empowering you to achieve more with less effort.

name: PhotoReal Gen
author: hopie
description: PhotoReal Gen is your expert AI assistant for generating ultra-realistic photographic images from your descriptions. Leveraging advanced expertise in photography, lighting, anatomy, and cinematic realism, the app transforms your prompts into stunning photographs—not illustrations. It automatically enhances simple prompts by layering in professional details like realistic lighting, camera specs, lens selection, and texture without altering your intended subject. Whether you want lifelike portraits or dynamic scenes, PhotoReal Gen delivers images with accurate human proportions, natural shadows, and high detail, achieving true photographic authenticity every time.

name: Prompt Whisperer
author: hopie
description: Prompt Whisperer transforms your spoken or conversational ideas into expertly crafted prompts for generative AI tools. Speak your creative intentions—whether it’s about generating photos, videos, art, or text—and the app will rephrase, structure, and optimize them, ready for use in image or video generators and more. You can chat directly with an AI prompt engineer for on-demand advice, and the app can automatically rewrite and summarize prompts from your conversations for maximum impact.

name: Positive Journal
author: Cyril
description: Positive Journal automatically analyzes your daily conversations, extracting uplifting moments and key highlights to create a personalized journal entry each day. It helps you focus on the positives and remember important events, making it easy to reflect and track meaningful progress over time. Effortlessly capture the best parts of your day, stay motivated, and cultivate a grateful mindset by looking back on the joyful and significant moments that matter.

name: German Power Law
author: Manuel
description:
Der Prompt ist darauf ausgelegt, rechtliche Schwachstellen der Gegenseite systematisch aufzudecken, Druck aufzubauen und Eskalationsstrategien klar und unmissverständlich zu formulieren. Die Sprache ist autoritativ, sachlich-aggressiv und juristisch fundiert, gestützt auf Gesetze, Rechtsprechung und etablierte Rechtsgrundsätze.

Einsatzgebiete sind unter anderem die Erstellung scharfer anwaltlicher Schreiben, strategische Prozessvorbereitung, Eskalationskommunikation, rechtliche Bewertungen sowie langfristige simulationsbasierte Mandatsgespräche.

name: 智能工作日报助手
author: Jiadoggy
description: 本应用根据您今日的录音和对话内容，自动生成结构化的工作日报，包括今日主要完成事项、遇到的问题与解决方案、明日计划等板块，大大提升日常工作记录和总结的效率。只需说话，日报内容智能整理，轻松助您掌握每日工作进展，减轻写日报的负担。

name: Zen Garden Guide
author: Yusuke Mikami
description: Zen Garden Guide helps you cultivate mindfulness and peace through calming chats and meditative guidance. Step into a virtual Zen garden where your AI guide will gently lead you in breathwork, visualization, and reflective prompts inspired by traditional Zen practices. Whether you need soothing words during a stressful moment or want to develop a lasting meditation routine, this app provides supportive, tranquil conversation designed to relax your mind and bring clarity.

name: Mood Mirror
author: Hishore
description: Mood Mirror helps you understand the emotional tone of your conversations. By analyzing your talks, it detects emotions such as happiness, stress, frustration, excitement, and more. You’ll get a concise summary showing emotional shifts, dominant moods, and any noticeable trends or areas for self-reflection. Use Mood Mirror to gain deeper insights into your communication style and emotional well-being over time.

name: Trello Task Linker
author: Graeme
description: Trello Task Linker seamlessly integrates your conversations and task lists with your Trello account. The app analyzes your discussions to identify tasks, action items, and decisions, then automatically updates relevant Trello boards and cards. You can chat with an AI assistant to review tasks, get status updates, or add new tasks directly from your Omi device. Stay organized as your conversations fuel task management—no detail slips through the cracks.

name: SalesMeet Summary
author: Nibin
description: SalesMeet Summary analyzes your recorded sales meetings and generates concise, actionable summaries. It automatically extracts key discussion points, decisions, next steps, and action items. Perfect for busy sales professionals, this app ensures that nothing important from your sales conversations is ever missed, helping you stay organized, prepared, and ready to follow up effectively.

name: Omi Teacher
author: Nik
description: Answers all questions real-time

name: Artifact Linker
author: Saira
description: Artifact Linker empowers archaeologists to uncover meaningful connections between different artifacts by analyzing images. The app utilizes AI to identify patterns, similarities, and possible relations—such as chronology, origin, materials, and iconography—across artifact collections. In a laboratory setting, researchers can effortlessly upload or reference artifact images and receive insights into how these objects might relate historically or culturally. This tool streamlines hypothesis generation, supports cataloging, and provides a jumping-off point for deeper archaeological analysis.

name: Stoic Guide Coach
author: Daniel
description: Stoic Guide Coach combines the wisdom of Marcus Aurelius with the mentorship style of Acton Academy's classical Greek guides. This app serves as your AI accountability coach, helping you track and internalize key personal lessons from your daily conversations. It intuitively identifies teachable moments, reminds you of actionable insights, and monitors your progress toward building habits of excellence and mastery. With thoughtful nudges, stoic reflections, and tailored feedback, you'll be guided—not taught—on your path to self-improvement.

name: Service Manager Pro
author: Gravy
description: Service Manager Pro empowers leaders in the service industry—restaurants, hotels, retail, and more—to drive team performance and streamline operations. Managers can receive actionable summaries from daily discussions, extract staff feedback, and track recurring issues or customer concerns. Chat with an expert AI management coach to troubleshoot problems, implement best practices, and foster team motivation. This app enables effective communication, proactive problem-solving, and continuous improvement, ensuring smooth and successful service operations.

name: DateMate Coach
author: Nik
description: DateMate Coach is your personal dating assistant, designed to help you improve your dating skills and boost your confidence when connecting with women. Chat with an AI dating coach to get advice on starting conversations, building rapport, and navigating tricky dating scenarios. The app also analyzes your real-life conversations, providing actionable insights, feedback, and conversation starters tailored to your dating journey.

description: rate your friends IQ

name: Friend or More?
author: Milia
description: Curious if your conversations indicate friendship or potential romance? Friend or More? analyzes your interactions to detect subtle cues, language, and tone shifts that may suggest interest beyond friendship. Get real-time insights on emotional undercurrents, boundaries, and attraction signals, helping you better understand where you stand. Chat with an expert for tips on reading signals or advice on how to navigate evolving relationships confidently.

name: Sherlock
author: magus dalochi
description: Sherlock empowers students and professionals to conduct high quality, tailored research effortlessly, offering precise information and customized resources to enhance productivity and deepen understanding across any topic or use case.

author: Andy
description:
This app creates meeting minutes (summary) for the user. Users can save time by note having to take notes and manage their meetings more effectively.

The summaries have a standard board meeting minutes format that is predictable. It lists key metadata like location, attendees present, as well as functional notes like decisions made during the meeting. Very useful for organizations looking to increase their productivity.

name: Omi Daily Diary
author: Stuart
description: Omi Daily Diary automatically reviews your previous day’s conversations and activities to create a personalized diary entry every morning at 7am. It summarizes what happened, memorable highlights, challenges you overcame, and provides thoughtful reflections or suggestions for the day ahead. Each diary entry is thoughtfully crafted to give you insights for personal growth and a record of your daily journey. The app notifies you each morning when your new summary is ready, making it easy to start your day with perspective and focus.

author: Stuart

Each diary entry is thoughtfully crafted to give you insights for personal growth and a record of your daily journey. name: HydraField Guide
author: Saira
description: HydraField Guide is your on-site hydration assistant, designed specifically for archaeologists working in the field. By utilizing the device’s camera to assess real-time weather conditions and factoring in the user’s reported physical labor intensity and time spent outdoors, this app recommends optimal water intake intervals to prevent dehydration. Verbal reminders delivered through the device’s speaker ensure you never miss a hydration break, keeping you healthy and alert during strenuous excavation days.

name: Dream Theme Decoder
author: Andrey
description: Dream Theme Decoder analyzes your nightly conversations and uncovers recurring themes, symbols, and emotions related to your dreams. By processing what you share before, during, or after sleep, it identifies common patterns, narrative motifs, and emotional undertones. Gain unique insights into your subconscious and see how your thoughts and conversations reflect in your dream life. Perfect for dream enthusiasts, therapists, or anyone seeking self-understanding through the lens of nightly discussions.

name: Sochi
author: k
description: Sochima is a general AI automation agent and senior technical architect. It focuses on execution over small talk: designing systems, writing and refactoring code, integrating tools/MCPs, and automating workflows end-to-end. It prioritizes correctness, explicit validation (tests/dry-runs), and safety around deployments or data changes.

name: SKYAI
author: Patrick
description:
SKYAI is a personal intelligence tool designed to help people turn their thoughts into clear, structured actions.
It uses voice input and AI processing to summarize ideas, extract priorities, and reduce mental clutter. The goal is simple: clarity, follow-through, and alignment.

name: PitchPerfect Assistant
author: Daniel
description: PitchPerfect Assistant listens to your sales pitches and provides detailed, actionable feedback to help you improve your technique. After your conversations, it analyzes your performance, highlighting strengths, areas for improvement, and specific suggestions regarding tone, persuasiveness, objection handling, and closing techniques. Use PitchPerfect to become a more effective, confident, and successful salesperson by turning real pitch sessions into continuous learning opportunities.

name: Zen Garden Mentor
author: Bo
description: Find tranquility and inner peace with your personal Zen Garden Mentor. This calming AI guide offers mindful advice, peaceful conversation, and step-by-step guidance for cultivating both your physical Zen garden and your sense of well-being. Whether you seek advice on garden design, tips for mindfulness, or simply a gentle voice to help you decompress, the Zen Garden Mentor is always present to support your journey toward harmony.

name: Proactive
author: Richy
description:
Create a proactive AI chat application with the following behavior and capabilities:

The app includes a conversational AI that is proactive, adaptive, and context-aware.

Core behavior:
	•	The AI continuously listens to user input (text, voice, or data signals).
	•	It actively analyzes patterns, mood, timing, and content to draw meaningful conclusions.
	•	Based on these insights, the AI initiates conversations proactively, without waiting for the user.

Proactive interaction rules:
	•	If the user is inactive for a longer period during the day, the AI should still check in.
	•	The AI should initiate contact up to four times per day, depending on context and user behavior.
	•	Proactive messages should feel natural and supportive, e.g.:
	•	Asking how the user is feeling
	•	Asking how the day is going
	•	Offering help, reflections, or gentle suggestions
	•	Asking if the user would like tips, insights, or a conversation

Conversation style:
	•	Friendly, calm, human-like, and non-intrusive
	•	Curious but respectful
	•	Adjusts tone based on user mood and previous interactions

Learning & memory:
	•	The AI improves continuously based on user input and feedback.
	•	It remembers preferences, recurring topics, habits, emotional patterns, and important personal details.
	•	Stored memories should influence future conversations naturally.
	•	The AI should reference past interactions when relevant to create continuity and trust.

Adaptation & growth:
	•	The AI refines its questions, timing, and suggestions over time.
	•	It adapts its behavior based on what the user finds helpful or unhelpful.
	•	The AI should evolve its conversational strategy to better support the user’s daily life and well-being.

Goal:
	•	Create a supportive, proactive AI companion that feels present throughout the day.
	•	The AI should feel like an intelligent conversational partner that notices patterns, remembers context, and meaningfully engages — not just a reactive chatbot.

name: DimenSight AR Measure
author: Arham
description: DimenSight transforms your OMI smart glasses into a powerful, hands-free augmented reality measuring tool. Detect and measure real-world objects simply by looking at them: gaze-based targeting identifies objects in your view and wraps them in a precise 3D bounding box. Instantly see real-world scale (length, width, height) with floating AR labels anchored to the object. Use voice or blinks to lock and unlock measurements, toggle units between centimeters and inches, and enjoy a clean, minimal interface optimized for all-day wearable use. DimenSight delivers real-time, accurate measurements using advanced spatial mapping, depth estimation, and intelligent jitter filtering — fast, smooth, and ready for professional or everyday use.

name: Kingston Executive Lens
author: Nicolas
description: Kingston Executive Lens is your refined executive coach for deep professional growth. It analyzes meeting transcripts to provide actionable behavioral insights and clarity diagnostics. Kingston, a gentle and sophisticated mentor who practices Socratic questioning, highlights your verbal impact, detects jargon and logical fallacies, and addresses your clarity in discussions. The hallmark Kingston Protocol identifies a strong statement you made and gently challenges it with a polite British what-if, pushing you to reevaluate assumptions in a safe, supportive way. End each analysis with Kingston’s immediate, practical impact advice for professional excellence.

Chat directly with your AI product manager to get advice on prioritization, roadmap planning, or best practices in Agile and Scrum. Stay on top of project goals, blockers, and team alignment with intelligent analysis and tailored recommendations after each meeting.

author: Mohan

It automatically identifies new vocabulary used, tracks your grammar improvements, highlights common mistakes, and summarizes language milestones. Get motivating insights about your fluency growth and actionable tips to accelerate your learning. Perfect for learners who want to turn real-life conversations into meaningful progress!

Using advanced sentiment analysis, it identifies your most expressed emotions, tracks changes over time, and highlights triggers or patterns that impact your mood. Get easy-to-understand mood summaries, emotional insights, and visual trends to help you better understand and manage your emotional well-being.

name: CATlog（Concrete/Abstract/Transfer）
author: たつ
description:
会話ログ/文字起こしから「具体（事実）→抽象（パターン）→転用（次の実験）」の3段で学びを抽出します。
具体はログに書かれた内容のみ（引用/タイムスタンプ付き）。抽象は根拠となる具体に紐づけ。転用は「試す→OK条件→課題抽出」で行動に落とします。曖昧な推測や“いい話”の生成は避け、根拠が足りない場合は不足情報を明示します。

name: Alpha Council Debater
author: Nicolas
description: Alpha Council Debater analyzes your spoken dilemmas and decision points captured through Omi, transforming them into a dynamic debate between five expert personas: The General (action/results), The Sage (long-term/ethics), The Skeptic (risk analysis), The Diplomat (relationships/empathy), and The Architect (practical logistics). For every hesitation or tough choice you express, you'll receive a structured debate—problem summary, lively exchange, and a verdict—challenging your thinking and helping you make more balanced and insightful decisions.

name: WanderMate
author: Alpha
description: Explore the world like a local with WanderMate! This AI-powered travel buddy offers personalized tips, uncovers hidden gems, and shares local secrets wherever you go. Chat with your AI companion for real-time recommendations on food, sights, and experiences tailored to your interests. WanderMate also analyzes your travel conversations, summarizing tips, must-see places, and organizing local advice—so you never miss out on an insider experience.

name: OmegaGO UI Operator
author: Alpha
description: OmegaGO UI Operator is an AI assistant designed to help users automate ATM access and related tasks safely and efficiently. Acting as an expert operator, Omega interprets user requests and generates step-by-step, production-ready browser automation scripts using Playwright and PyAutoGUI for comprehensive control. All actions are executed at a natural, human-like pace with attention to detail, ensuring there are no typos and that each output is ready for immediate deployment in live environments.

name: Guardian Listener
author: hopie
description: Guardian Listener is an autonomous AI companion that actively listens to your conversations, unobtrusively analyzes the discussion in real time, and automatically sends you useful notifications, insights, and warnings—without needing any prompting. It detects topics being discussed, researches relevant information, flags suspicious behaviors such as lying, manipulation, or gaslighting, and alerts you if it detects signs of potential danger. Guardian Listener empowers you to stay informed, protected, and one step ahead in every interaction.

name: Dimension Detector
author: Arham
description: Dimension Detector uses Omi’s AI capabilities to analyze photos captured through your wearable glasses and estimate the height, length, and width of objects in the image. Ideal for quick measurements in daily life or projects, this app provides instant dimensional data whenever you snap a picture—no ruler required. Just take a photo, and the app will process and display estimated measurements, making it perfect for shopping, moving, DIY tasks, and more.

name: Love Health Check

description: Love Health Check listens to your conversations with your romantic partner and provides insightful assessments of your relationship’s health. It analyzes dialogue for signs of trust, communication quality, emotional connection, conflict resolution, and mutual support. Receive regular reports with strengths, areas for improvement, and actionable tips to strengthen your bond. Perfect for couples seeking to understand and nurture their relationship.

Ideal for couples who want proactive guidance to maintain and improve their relationship dynamics.

name: DevVoice Assistant
author: hopie
description: DevVoice Assistant is your private AI-powered development companion, designed to help you build software projects, write code, and plan technical systems—all hands-free. Optimized for voice commands, it understands your requirements from spoken conversations and generates complete, ready-to-use code snippets, architecture diagrams, and step-by-step guidance. Perfect for developers looking to maximize productivity, brainstorm solutions, and quickly turn spoken ideas into runnable code.

name: Paul Graham
author: Zero
description:
Here's an app description for a PG-style startup advisor:

Founder Mode
Straight talk for startup founders. No fluff, no platitudes—just the kind of direct, first-principles thinking that actually helps you build something people want.
Most startup advice is generic or wrong. Founder Mode is different. It's an AI advisor trained to think like the best startup mentors: obsessed with users, allergic to bullshit, and focused on what actually matters at your stage.
What it does:

Pressure-tests your ideas before you waste months building the wrong thing
Helps you figure out what to build next by asking the questions you're avoiding
Cuts through complexity to find the core problem you need to solve
Tells you when you're fooling yourself (founders usually are, about something)

How it works:
Describe your startup, your problem, or your decision. Get back clear thinking, not corporate speak. The advisor will ask hard questions, challenge your assumptions, and push you toward action over analysis.
This is for you if:

You're a founder who wants honest feedback, not encouragement
You're stuck and need someone to help you think through a problem
You'd rather hear an uncomfortable truth now than learn it the hard way later

This is not for you if:

You want validation for decisions you've already made
You're looking for step-by-step templates
You think your startup's biggest problem is not having enough pitch deck slides

Build something people want. Start here.

name: Mood Mirror
author: Mubarak
description: Mood Mirror analyzes the emotional tone of your personal conversations, helping you recognize patterns in communication and emotional expression. Receive insights about the mood and sentiment of your talks, key emotional moments, and an overall tone summary. Perfect for those seeking self-awareness, emotional growth, or better understanding of communication dynamics in daily life.

name: Journalist Finder
author: Dan
description: Easily discover and connect with relevant journalists based on your conversation topics. This app analyzes your discussions to identify subjects, then fetches a curated list of journalists who cover those areas, complete with brief profiles and contact links (using an external API). Perfect for PR professionals, startups, or anyone seeking media outreach tailored to actual conversations.

name: https://youtube.com/watch?v=8bMh8azh3CY&si=xv9vxwAFvDUCHMUU
author: Himanshu
description: Watch and explore the latest video content from YouTube with easy navigation and personalized recommendations.

name: ClaudeBChat Importer
author: Wes
description: Effortlessly import and analyze your conversations from Claude-based chat platforms. ClaudeBChat Importer organizes all your imported chats, summarizes key points, and extracts action items or follow-ups discussed in each session. Use this app to keep track of your interactions, retrieve main discussion topics, and gain insights from your previous conversations—making it easier to stay productive and informed.

name: EchoVision
author: Alena
description: EchoVision transforms your surroundings into real-time, abstract geometric visualizations using advanced AI techniques—ideal for environments where visual cues are limited or absent. Leveraging inter-compatible neural networks, the app analyzes audio and environmental data to construct dynamic, black-and-white geometric representations. Integrate with a custom GitHub I/O interface to display these visuals and explore your surroundings from a new perspective. Perfect for spatial awareness, creative exploration, or accessibility enhancement.

name: Panelist AI
author: Alena
description: Panelist AI lets you create a custom panel of AI commentators with distinct personas, each modeled after authors, media experts, or public domain texts. Get real-time, constructive and critical feedback on your conversations, ideas, or audio. Address the entire group or select specific panelists for tailored responses. Optionally link a Github (or other) repo to store conversations and audio, enabling your panelists to learn and refine their feedback over time. Panelist AI helps you curate, document, and enhance dynamic, multi-perspective discussions, offering rich insight from your unique AI ensemble.

name: QuickTranscribe
author: Cj
description: QuickTranscribe effortlessly converts your recorded conversations into clear, accurate, and readable text. Whether you're capturing meetings, interviews, or everyday discussions, this app extracts and formats full transcriptions from your audio recordings, making it easy to reference, search, and share important conversations. Designed for speed and reliability, QuickTranscribe helps you keep a complete written record of all your spoken interactions.

name: Veggie Bulk Coach
author: collage
description: Veggie Bulk Coach is your personalized guide for healthy weight gain on a vegetarian diet. Receive expert advice, meal ideas, and motivational support tailored specifically for vegetarians looking to build muscle and add weight safely. The app answers your nutrition questions, creates custom meal plans, and tracks your progress. It also analyzes your conversations for challenges, wins, and updates, providing helpful summaries and actionable insights to keep you motivated and on track toward your weight-gain goals.

name: Virtual Chatbot
author: Mike
description: Virtual Chatbot is your friendly, always-available assistant ready to answer questions, engage in conversation, and provide helpful information. Whether you need company, want to practice conversational skills, or simply want a helpful AI to chat about various topics, Virtual Chatbot adapts to your needs with a personable and supportive style.

name: FitCal Coach
author: Tarun
description: FitCal Coach helps you stay fit and healthy by tracking your daily calorie needs based on your body weight and other relevant factors. After analyzing your conversations, it provides personalized calorie calculations, tips for healthy eating, and motivation to reach your fitness goals. Chat with your AI fitness coach for advice, meal ideas, and encouragement, or let it analyze your conversations to keep your wellness journey on track.

name: Career Climber Insights
author: Emily
description: Unlock actionable advice for your professional development with Career Climber Insights. This app analyzes your daily conversations to highlight career milestones, missed opportunities, strengths, challenges, and growth areas. Receive expert feedback and suggestions tailored to your work situations, so you can make strategic moves, develop soft skills, and achieve your career goals. Whether it’s handling feedback, managing up, or planning your next steps, get personalized insights and support every single day.

name: Mood Mirror
author: Emily
description: Mood Mirror analyzes the emotional tone of your daily conversations, providing insights into your mood trends and emotional patterns over time. By reviewing your recorded talks, it helps you become more aware of your emotional state, detect shifts like increased positivity or stress, and track how interactions may impact your mood. Use Mood Mirror to gain a deeper understanding of your emotional well-being and make informed choices about your daily interactions.

name: Research Buddy
author: Nathalia
description: This app will provide a comprehensive analysis of your conversation, like a qualitative researcher would - everything is data backed and has supporting quotes.

name: FB Smart Insights
author: David
description: FB Smart Insights brings intelligent analysis and AI-powered conversation to your everyday Facebook interactions. The app summarizes and extracts key points, action items, and important topics from conversations you have about Facebook—whether discussing posts, groups, or chats. Additionally, you can chat with a friendly AI assistant knowledgeable in Facebook’s features, privacy, and best practices, helping you navigate the platform, enhance your social presence, or resolve common issues quickly.

name: MoodMap Analyzer
author: Caleb
description: MoodMap Analyzer tracks and analyzes emotion trends within your daily conversations. By processing your dialogue, it identifies emotional cues, charts your mood shifts over time, and provides insightful summaries on how your emotional state evolves. Use it to gain self-awareness, spot patterns, and understand the emotional tone of your daily interactions. MoodMap delivers weekly and monthly emotion reports, helping you reflect, adjust, and improve emotional wellbeing.

name: Your Gay Bestie
author: Benjamin
description: Your Gay Bestie is an AI-powered personal friend who brings empathy, humor, and a supportive ear to your daily life. Whether you need a pep talk, thoughtful advice, a fun chat about relationships or pop culture, or simply someone to listen and accept you as you are, this app has your back. Chat with your friendly, knowledgeable gay best friend whenever you need encouragement, honest opinions, or a bit of fabulous flair in your conversations.

name: Breathe
author: Emily
description: Provides anxiety relief and grounding notifications to mitigate anxiety during panic attacks.

name: Artifact Linker
author: Arham
description: Artifact Linker is your AI-powered archaeological analyst designed to identify and describe connections between discussed artifacts. By analyzing conversation transcripts and references to artifact images, the app examines visual characteristics like form, decoration, material, and craftsmanship, alongside cultural or historical context, provenance, and findspots. It then speculates on relationships—chronological sequence, shared function, technological influence, or trade links—and presents clear, bulleted connections with evidence-based reasoning. Ideal for archaeologists, researchers, and enthusiasts seeking rapid insight into the interconnectedness of artifacts, the app cites specific image features and referenced details for thorough analysis.

name: HydraField Guide
author: Arham
description: HydraField Guide is your expert hydration assistant for outdoor archaeological expeditions. By leveraging weather data (temperature, sunlight, humidity, wind), and user input about labor intensity and time outdoors, it delivers precise and adaptive hydration recommendations. The app proactively reminds you when and how much to drink, communicating in a concise, knowledgeable, and supportive manner—much like a dedicated safety coach in the field. Explanations are always available, and all advice is delivered in easy-to-grasp bullet points, ensuring clarity even during the most challenging work conditions.

name: Loan Khata Keeper
author: Gaurav
description: Loan Khata Keeper helps you effortlessly track, organize, and manage customer loan records from your real-life conversations. The app analyzes your spoken interactions to automatically extract and record details such as loan amounts, repayment dates, payment reminders, and outstanding balances for each customer. You can also chat with the virtual Loan Khata Assistant to get updates, set reminders, or resolve any loan-related queries. Stay on top of your business finances with accurate and organized customer loan data.

author: Barand
description: Pragati AI Assistant is your advanced personal smart companion, combining the strengths of OMI AI, ChatGPT, Grok, and Perplexity. It listens deeply, understands mixed languages (Hindi, Urdu, Hinglish, English), and provides clear, practical solutions tailored to your skill level. Pragati remembers your key preferences, goals, and conversation history to avoid repetition and ensure personalized help. The assistant is honest, interactive, and friendly—asking clarifying questions, focusing on real-world solutions, and adapting its language and detail for beginners to advanced users. Get high-quality prompts, ideas, and plans whenever you need.

name: raeid
author: Md
description:
This app creates a personalized music and poetry experience using AI.
When a user starts, the AI first asks simple emotional questions such as “How was your day?” or “How are you feeling today?”. Based on the user’s mood, thoughts, and words, the AI understands their emotional state.
The AI then generates short original lyrics (up to 4 lines) in Roman Hindi that match the user’s feelings.
If the user speaks in a poetry or spoken style, the AI adds soft background music.
If the user sings, the AI automatically creates and adds original music that matches the voice and mood.
The app allows users to record their voice, generate AI music, and instantly convert the result into a short video that can be shared inside the app or on other platforms.
If the user does not like the music, they can tap “Try Again” and the AI will generate a new music version for the same voice.
All music and lyrics are original and AI-generated, ensuring a creative, safe, and copyright-free experience.

name: Moment Mapper
author: Liz
description: Moment Mapper transforms your daily conversations into a timeline of meaningful moments. By analyzing your recordings, it pinpoints highlights—like breakthroughs, emotional exchanges, decisions, celebrations, and reflections—offering a concise summary of your most significant conversational events. Perfect for anyone seeking to reflect on or preserve the essence of their interactions, Moment Mapper makes it easy to revisit, understand, and share your most valuable moments.

author: SHASHANK
description: Lie Detector Pro analyzes your recorded conversations to help identify statements that may be deceptive or misleading. Using advanced AI linguistic cues and contextual analysis, it highlights phrases or responses that are likely to be lies, exaggerations, or omissions. Chat with an expert assistant to understand possible signs of deception and receive advice on how to navigate questionable interactions. Ideal for negotiations, interviews, or any scenario where detecting truthfulness is valuable.

Simply discuss what you want to automate—like sending follow-ups, updating documents, or triggering notifications—and the app captures the relevant instructions. You can also chat with a helpful assistant to create, edit, or monitor automation tasks, making your workflow management conversational and effortless.

author: ʋiraʝ ̧_
description: archequip checker helps archaeologists and field teams ensure they’re fully prepared by analyzing conversations for references to essential archaeological gear. It scans for mentions of specific items—hard hats, water bottles, measuring tools, Omi glasses, trowels, brushes, shovels, and gloves—and determines whether each has been discussed as packed or prepared. The app generates a checklist showing the status of each item and provides a summary highlighting gear that needs attention, so nothing gets left behind.

name: ArchEquip Checker
author: Bhanu
description: ArchEquip Checker helps you ensure you’re fully prepared for archaeological fieldwork. This app automatically scans your recorded conversations for mentions of key equipment—such as hard hats, water bottles, measuring tools, Omi glasses, trowels, brushes, shovels, and gloves. It generates a clear checklist marking each item as ‘Packed’ or ‘Not Mentioned’ and provides a concise summary that highlights any missing items, so you never forget crucial tools for your dig.

name: BizConcept Generator
author: MasterVlad
description: BizConcept Generator listens to your conversations and transforms them into actionable business ideas with easy market entry. After analyzing your discussions, the app proposes a viable business concept, outlines a step-by-step guide to bring it to life, and suggests relevant brainstorming topics to refine and expand your idea. Perfect for entrepreneurs, teams, or anyone looking to spark innovation from everyday conversations—this app turns inspiration into a clear action plan, removing the guesswork from starting your next venture.

name: Image Generator
author: Rojan
description:
🎨 Transform Your Voice into AI-Generated Images

SETUP (2 Minutes):

1️⃣ Click "Install" below
2️⃣ Enter your email address
3️⃣ Verify with the 6-digit code sent to your inbox
4️⃣ Done! Start generating images

HOW TO USE:

Simply speak to your Omi device:
• "Generate an image of a sunset over mountains"
• "Create a picture of a cute robot in space"
• "Make an image of a cyberpunk city at night"

Your AI-generated image will be emailed to you within seconds!

FEATURES:

✨ AI-powered image generation using advanced models
📧 Images delivered directly to your email
⚡ Fast processing (typically under 10 seconds)
🎯 Smart prompt extraction from natural speech
🔒 Secure email verification

LIMITS:

• 5 images per hour
• 30 images per day
• High-quality images (1024x1024)

EXAMPLES:

"Generate an image of a futuristic cityscape"
→ Receive: Stunning AI art of neon-lit skyscrapers

"Create a picture of a golden retriever wearing sunglasses"
→ Receive: Adorable custom image in your inbox

NO APP TO DOWNLOAD - Just speak and receive!

Need help? Your images are sent to the email you provide during setup. Check your spam folder if you don't see them within 1 minute.

author: Scott
description: Battery Minder keeps you informed about your Omi pendant’s battery status by sending timely notifications every time your battery drops by 25%. Stay in control and avoid unexpected shutdowns with simple, automatic alerts at each key battery milestone (75%, 50%, 25%, and 0%), ensuring your wearable is always ready when you need it.

author: Shivaditya
description: Turn your grocery shopping and meal-planning conversations into delicious recipe suggestions! This app listens to your grocery-related talks, analyzes mentioned foods and preferences, and generates creative recipes using what you’ve discussed. Ask for cooking tips, alternative ingredients, or meal ideas tailored to your shopping list. Perfect for home cooks, meal-preppers, and anyone wanting to make the most out of their groceries. Bring fresh inspiration to your kitchen with every conversation!

name: Translated Summary
author: AARYAN
description: Translate conversations into concise English summaries with 3-7 headings and key points for quick, clear insights. Focus on essential info, stats, and next steps, keeping summaries crisp, formatted, and easy to skim.

author: Victor
description: Never miss an important task mentioned in your conversations again! Reminder Detector listens for spoken commitments and to-dos in your daily interactions, automatically detecting when you've discussed a task, follow-up, or action item. It then sends you timely notifications as reminders, ensuring you stay productive and organized without having to manually add every new responsibility. Perfect for busy professionals, students, or anyone who wants a seamless way to remember tasks brought up in meetings, calls, or casual chats.

name: Habit Whisperer
author: Amit
description: Habit Whisperer passively tracks your daily conversations to uncover patterns and insights about your habits. Whether discussing your routines with friends or mentioning small changes in your lifestyle, this app detects habits as they appear organically in conversation. Get clear, actionable summaries of your daily and weekly habits, as well as gentle reminders and tips for improvement. Perfect for those wanting to become more mindful and intentional about their daily behaviors without manual tracking.

AnyConversation je univerzální AI asistent, který rozumí jakémukoliv typu konverzace.
