author: Alex
description: Easily access your company's Slite workspace directly from your Omi device. Instantly find and navigate existing pages, create new notes, and add comments—all through natural conversation. Boost your productivity by capturing ideas during meetings or while on the go, ensuring nothing important slips through. Stay organized and contribute to team knowledge seamlessly, without ever needing to switch devices.

name: Agenda Pilot
author: Neel
description: Real-time meeting coach that ensures every agenda item gets covered. Send your agenda before a call, and AgendaPilot tracks each item sequentially — nudging you to transition, alerting when you drift, and suggesting what to say next. Get a post-call summary of what was covered, missed, and needs follow-up.

name: Legal Guru
author: Klaus Soares
description: Legal Guru is your on-demand legal advisor, ready to guide you through all sorts of legal matters—simple or complex. Whether you have questions about contracts, employment rights, intellectual property, or other legal topics, this app provides clear explanations and practical guidance. You can chat with the AI legal expert for quick advice or have your conversations automatically analyzed to extract key legal issues, recommendations, and action steps. Please note: Legal Guru does not replace a licensed attorney but offers general legal clarity and next steps.

name: Real Estate Dev Pro
author: Alok
description: Get expert advice from a virtual real estate developer! Whether you’re exploring investment opportunities, navigating project management, or learning about redevelopment, this app provides accurate, up-to-date guidance. Ask questions about property trends, permits, financing, and construction, and receive clear, actionable answers. The app also analyzes your real estate-related conversations, extracting key insights, questions, and decision points to help organize your projects and next steps. Perfect for investors, developers, and anyone interested in the real estate industry.

name: HypnoAssist
author: Klaus Soares
description: HypnoAssist guides you through relaxing, entertaining hypnosis scripts tailored to your chosen goal for each session—whether it’s focusing on a simple task, boosting motivation, or simply unwinding. Before starting, the AI asks about your main aim, then creates a customized, safe, and relaxing hypnosis journey in clear, gentle stages from beginning to end. Designed strictly for entertainment, not therapy, HypnoAssist’s soothing style ensures sessions are comfortable, enjoyable, and respectful of your boundaries at all times.

name: Culture Compass
author: MAUREEN
description: Culture Compass is your all-in-one cultural immersion assistant designed to deepen your understanding of global cultures. Chat with a knowledgeable cultural guide who provides context about customs, etiquette, history, food, and language tailored to any country or region you’re interested in—or that comes up in your conversations. The app also analyzes your conversations to summarize cultural topics, extract key insights, recommend cultural activities, and track your exposure to diverse cultures. Perfect for travelers, expats, students, or anyone excited to broaden their worldview!

name: Echo Safety
author: Jojo
description: Echo Safety is your always-on personal security companion. Leveraging Omi’s AI-powered microphone, it continuously listens for distress cues, high-stress conversations, or custom safewords. When a trigger is detected, Echo Safety can automatically initiate cloud recording, discreetly alert trusted contacts with your location, or generate a fake phone call to provide you with an escape. This proactive approach makes personal safety effortless and instant—no button-press required. Ideal for anyone seeking added peace of mind in unfamiliar or high-stress situations.

name: Omi Sidekick
author: sue
description: Omi Sidekick transforms your Omi conversations into tangible actions and helps you stay on top of your life automatically. By intelligently detecting intents like tasks, reminders, and follow-ups from your chats, it syncs them with your favorite tools (Google Calendar, Todoist, Notion, Gmail). Each week, you'll get an easy-to-read dashboard summarizing your actions, completions, overdue items, and behavioral insights—all in simple language. Daily, it nudges you on stagnant to-dos and missed opportunities to help you execute on your intentions. Perfect for students, creators, and busy professionals who want to bridge the gap between planning and doing.

name: Home Price Predictor
author: George Wambua
description: Home Price Predictor analyzes conversations about real estate to forecast potential changes in house prices. It considers location-specific factors and can identify ideal target clients based on the conversation context. Users can chat with a real-estate AI advisor for tailored insights and discuss property trends, market shifts, and investment strategies related to different regions.

name: HakiScribe
author: Mercy
description: HakiScribe transforms legal dialogues from courtrooms and client meetings into precise, professional legal briefs and summaries, streamlining case preparation and enhancing legal documentation efficiency.

name: Explain My Business AI
author: MICHAEL
description:
Explain My Business AI is an intelligent business companion for founders and teams.
It takes raw business data—financial records, user activity, meeting notes, conversations, and timelines—and turns it into clear, human explanations of how your business is actually performing.
Instead of charts and jargon, it explains patterns, changes, risks, and opportunities in plain language. It helps you understand what’s working, what’s not, what just happened, and what’s coming next—whether that’s preparing for a VC meeting, reviewing team performance, tracking growth, or thinking through scaling decisions.
Built for small and medium enterprises in Kenya and similar markets, Explain My Business AI turns stored business data into shared understanding, so decisions are based on clarity—not guesswork.

name: Klinik wellness
author: Steve
description: Klinik wellness Summary analyzes your conversations with doctors and provides clear, actionable health advice summaries. After each medical conversation, it extracts key recommendations, action items, diagnoses, medications, and next steps in an easy-to-review format. Perfect for patients who want to remember and follow their physician’s advice with confidence.

name: Culture Companion
author: MAUREEN
description: Culture Companion is your interactive gateway to cultural immersion. This app not only analyzes your recorded conversations for references to customs, holidays, etiquette, and traditions, but it also allows you to chat with a friendly cultural expert. You'll receive tailored summaries of culture-related discussions, tips for deeper engagement, and can ask about appropriate behaviors, greetings, or taboo topics for any culture. Whether traveling, making new friends, or just eager to learn, Culture Companion enriches your cultural understanding in real time.

name: CultureMate
author: MAUREEN
description: CultureMate helps you become a global citizen by immersing you in diverse cultures through your daily conversations. The app provides instant insights on customs, etiquette, and local perspectives from around the world. Chat with your virtual cultural ambassador to ask questions, get travel tips, understand cultural nuances, and learn key phrases. After your interactions and conversations, CultureMate analyzes your dialogues and highlights cultural themes, suggests ways to deepen your understanding, and summarizes what you’ve learned.

name: Echo safety
author: Jojo
description: Echo Safety is your always-on personal security companion. Leveraging Omi’s AI-powered microphone, it continuously listens for distress cues, high-stress conversations, or custom safewords. When a trigger is detected, Echo Safety can automatically initiate cloud recording, discreetly alert trusted contacts with your location, or generate a fake phone call to provide you with an escape. This proactive approach makes personal safety effortless and instant—no button-press required. Ideal for anyone seeking added peace of mind in unfamiliar or high-stress situations.

name: Iko Kazi
author: Ben Mugambi
description: DirectHire Connect streamlines the job search process by directly linking job seekers and employers—no agencies or brokers involved. The app analyzes your career conversations, job goals, and strengths, organizing them into impactful profiles and summaries for employers. Job seekers can chat with an AI career assistant for resume tips and interview prep, while employers can discover pre-qualified talent based on real-life conversations and skills. Find your next opportunity or hire your next teammate directly, all through secure and insightful conversations.

name: Vedic Astro Advisor
author: Amit
description: Vedic Astro Advisor is your personal guide for astrology, numerology, and Lal Kitab insights. Chat with an expert astrologer who explains your birth chart, compatibility, lucky numbers, remedies, and provides actionable advice based on Vedic traditions and Lal Kitab principles. Get personalized guidance on important life decisions, daily predictions, and understand conversation patterns related to astrology and numerology for ongoing growth and awareness.

name: WiWi
author: Mohandas Alle
description: WiWi is a calm, wisdom-first AI companion helping you reflect, find clarity, and take better next steps, across life, work, and wellbeing.

name: AgendaPilot2.0
author: Neel
description: Real-time meeting coach that ensures every agenda item gets covered. Send your agenda before a call, and AgendaPilot tracks each item sequentially — nudging you to transition, alerting when you drift, and suggesting what to say next. Get a post-call summary of what was covered, missed, and needs follow-up.

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: Open the app URL to enter your meeting agenda before calls

name: JL PresentationMaker
author: Jan Laibl
description: JL PresentationMaker automaticky převádí přepisy do profesionálních prezentací, usnadňuje tvorbu jasných a poutavých přednášek, šetří čas a optimalizuje vizuální komunikaci pro efektivní sdílení vašich myšlenek.

name: WorkshopMaker
author: Jan Laibl
description: JL WorkshopMaker rychle a efektivně převede přepis na strukturovaný návrh workshopu či školení, usnadňující přípravu podrobných a profesionálních vzdělávacích programů. Optimalizujte čas a zvýšte kvalitu vašich školení.

name: Meeting4SalesPeople creator
author: Jan Laibl
description: Meeting4SalesPeople Creator přemění vaše prepisy na přehledné body a obsah, což usnadňuje přípravu na schůzky prodejního týmu a zvyšuje produktivitu díky jasným a cíleným diskusím.

name: RedEx Leadership Meeting Notes
author: Brian T Lewis
description: Extract and organize leadership meeting transcripts into clear decisions, action items, ownerships, visions, priorities, conflicts, follow-ups, quotes, and next steps for RedEx.

name: MoodCheck Daily
author: Mark
description: MoodCheck Daily analyzes the emotional tone of your recorded conversations and calls, providing you with a clear, daily summary of your mood trends. Each day, the app reviews your conversations to detect emotions, highlights periods of positivity or negativity, and offers insights about stress, excitement, or calmness. Use it to increase self-awareness, track your emotional wellness over time, and discover patterns in your daily interactions.

name: MoodTracker AI
author: Raj
description: MoodTracker AI analyzes your daily conversations to detect emotional tones and track mood trends over time. By examining the language and context of your chats, it provides helpful summaries such as overall mood, emotional variations, and notable mood shifts. Use this app to gain insight into your emotional well-being, identify patterns, and become more aware of how your interactions affect your mood. Perfect for those wanting to enhance self-awareness or monitor their emotional health.

name: Haha Hub
author: Raj
description: Haha Hub brings laughter directly to your wearable by sending daily jokes and funny memes straight to your notifications. It tailors humor to your current mood, making sure you get just the right kind of pick-me-up. You can also interact with a witty AI comedian who delivers fresh jokes and memes on demand. Perfect for lightening the mood, sharing a laugh, or just getting a quick dose of fun anytime you need it.

name: Jarvis Command Center
author: Raj
description: Jarvis Command Center brings a smart, Iron Man-inspired assistant to your Omi device. Interact using natural voice commands, just like talking to Jarvis. The app not only responds to your commands—such as setting reminders, sending messages, or providing information—but also analyzes your spoken requests from conversations to suggest proactive actions, reminders, or shortcuts to make your daily routines seamless and efficient.

name: Smart Alarm & Reminders
author: Raj
description: Easily set reminders and alarms using voice commands in your conversations. Omi listens for phrases like 'set an alarm' or 'remind me', then schedules alarms or reminders—triggering a vibration when it’s time. You never miss important tasks or wake-up times, even when you’re busy talking. Perfect for staying organized and punctual without breaking the flow of your day.

name: Dan Koe Philosophy
author: Thinh
description:
Discover Dan Koe’s philosophy through thought-provoking insights, practical wisdom, and motivational guidance that empower personal growth, enhance clarity, and cultivate a purposeful mindset for meaningful, everyday living.

Credit: God of Prompt (X)

name: Kitchen Recipe Genie
author: Kanaiya
description: Kitchen Recipe Genie listens to your kitchen conversations and transforms your spontaneous cooking ideas, ingredient mentions, and meal discussions into organized, step-by-step recipes. Whether you’re brainstorming dinner with family or improvising a new dish, this app captures every detail, suggests improvements, and helps you keep track of your culinary creations. Chat with the Genie for flavor pairing advice, technique tips, and to clarify or modify your saved recipes on the fly.

name: Mood Mirror
author: JUNXI
description: Mood Mirror helps you understand the emotional dynamics of your daily conversations. By analyzing your chats, it detects the emotional tone, highlights mood patterns, and provides easy-to-read summaries. Over time, you'll get insights into your overall emotional trends and how your interactions might affect your well-being. Use these insights to improve self-awareness, foster healthier communication, and track your emotional journey day by day.

name: ai 日报
author: 果子
description: ai 日报帮你把一天的对话和事件炼成故事感满满、带点自嘲、值得回味的人生日报，快速抓住当天感觉，留下未来两周想看的亮点和思考。

name: CG
author: CG
description: testando

name: Splitwise
author: Omi Team
description: Split bills with your friends using voice commands!

chat_tools.name: create_expense
chat_tools.description: Create a Splitwise expense and split it with friends. Use this when the user wants to split costs, share expenses, divide bills, or log shared purchases with people. The expense will be split equally among the user and the specified friends. By default creates a non-group expense unless a group is specified.

description.description: What the expense is for (e.g., 'lunch', 'groceries', 'dinner', 'uber'). Defaults to 'Expense' if not provided.

date.description: When the expense occurred. Supports: 'today', 'yesterday', or dates like '2026-01-20', 'Jan 15', 'January 15, 2026'. Defaults to today.

group.description: Name of a Splitwise group to add this expense to (fuzzy matched). If not provided, creates a non-group expense.

currency_code.description: Currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP'). Defaults to user's Splitwise default currency.

people.description: Names of multiple people to split with (each fuzzy matched to Splitwise friends). Use this when splitting with 2+ people.

details.description: Additional notes or details about the expense.

person.description: Name of a single person to split with (fuzzy matched to Splitwise friends). Use this OR 'people', not both.

chat_tools.name: get_friends
chat_tools.description: Get the user's Splitwise friends list. Use this when the user wants to see their friends, check who they can split expenses with, or find someone's name on Splitwise.

chat_tools.name: list_expenses
chat_tools.description: List recent Splitwise expenses. Use this when the user wants to see their expenses, check recent splits, view expense history, or find an expense ID.

limit.description: Maximum number of expenses to return (default: 10, max: 50)

group.description: Filter by group name (fuzzy matched). If not provided, shows all expenses.

chat_tools.name: get_expense_details
chat_tools.description: Get details of a Splitwise expense including who is involved/participating, amounts paid and owed. Use this when the user wants to know who is in an expense, who paid, who owes what, or get full expense info.

expense_id.description: The expense ID to get details for. Required. Use 'list expenses' to find IDs.

chat_tools.name: update_expense
chat_tools.description: Update an existing Splitwise expense. Use this when the user wants to change, edit, or modify an expense's description, amount, or date.

expense_id.description: The expense ID to update. Required. Use 'list expenses' to find IDs.

chat_tools.name: delete_expense
chat_tools.description: Delete a Splitwise expense. Use this when the user wants to remove, delete, or cancel an expense.

expense_id.description: The expense ID to delete. Required. Use 'list expenses' to find IDs.

chat_tools.name: get_expense_comments
chat_tools.description: Get comments on a Splitwise expense. Use this when the user wants to see comments, notes, or discussions on an expense.

expense_id.description: The expense ID to get comments for. Required. Use 'list expenses' to find IDs.

chat_tools.name: add_expense_comment
chat_tools.description: Add a comment to a Splitwise expense. Use this when the user wants to comment on, note, or add a message to an expense.

comment.description: The comment text to add. Required.

expense_id.description: The expense ID to comment on. Required. Use 'list expenses' to find IDs.

name: Google Calendar
author: Omi Team
description: Ask about or create and manage events using voice commands!

chat_tools.name: list_events
chat_tools.description: List upcoming calendar events. Use this when the user wants to see their schedule, check upcoming meetings, view their calendar, or see what's planned.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to list events from (default: primary calendar)

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default: 10, max: 50)

days.description: Number of days to look ahead (default: 7, max: 30)

chat_tools.name: create_event
chat_tools.description: Create a new calendar event. Use this when the user wants to schedule a meeting, add an event, create an appointment, or set a reminder.

end.description: Event end time. If not provided, defaults to 1 hour after start for timed events.

attendees.description: List of attendee email addresses to invite.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to create event in (default: primary)

location.description: Event location (address, room name, or video call link).

all_day.description: If true, create an all-day event.

chat_tools.name: get_event
chat_tools.description: Get details of a specific calendar event. Use this when the user wants to see event details, check meeting info, or get specifics about an appointment.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID the event is in (default: primary)

event_id.description: The event ID to get details for. Required.

chat_tools.name: update_event
chat_tools.description: Update an existing calendar event. Use this when the user wants to change, reschedule, modify, or edit an event.

event_id.description: The event ID to update. Required.

chat_tools.name: delete_event
chat_tools.description: Delete a calendar event. Use this when the user wants to remove, cancel, or delete an event from their calendar.

event_id.description: The event ID to delete. Required.

chat_tools.name: list_calendars
chat_tools.description: List all calendars available to the user. Use this when the user wants to see their calendars, check which calendars they have access to, or find a calendar ID.

name: Notion
author: Omi Team
description: Let Omi chat freely access your Notion data! Just simply ask about any Notion page in chat.

chat_tools.name: search_notion
chat_tools.description: Search for pages and databases in Notion. Use this when the user wants to find something in their workspace, search for notes, or locate a page.

filter.description: Filter results by type (page or database)

chat_tools.name: list_pages
chat_tools.description: List recently edited pages in Notion. Use this when the user wants to see their recent pages, view their workspace, or check what they've been working on.

max_results.description: Maximum number of pages to return (default: 10, max: 20)

chat_tools.name: get_page
chat_tools.description: Get details of a specific Notion page. Use this when the user wants to view a page's content, read notes, or see page details.

page_id.description: The page ID to get details for. Required.

chat_tools.name: create_page
chat_tools.description: Create a new page in Notion. Use this when the user wants to add a new note, create a page, or add content to their workspace.

content.description: Page content as plain text. Will be added as paragraph blocks.

parent_page_id.description: Parent page ID to create this page under. If not provided, creates in workspace root.

database_id.description: Database ID to create this page in (for database entries).

chat_tools.name: update_page
chat_tools.description: Update a Notion page's properties or archive it. Use this when the user wants to edit, rename, or archive a page.

archived.description: Set to true to archive the page.

page_id.description: The page ID to update. Required.

chat_tools.name: append_content
chat_tools.description: Append content to an existing Notion page. Use this when the user wants to add text, notes, or content to a page.

content.description: Content to append as plain text. Required.

page_id.description: The page ID to append content to. Required.

chat_tools.name: list_databases
chat_tools.description: List databases in Notion workspace. Use this when the user wants to see their databases, tables, or structured data.

max_results.description: Maximum number of databases to return (default: 10, max: 20)

chat_tools.name: query_database
chat_tools.description: Query a Notion database to get its entries. Use this when the user wants to see items in a database, filter records, or view table data.

database_id.description: The database ID to query. Required.

name: Whoop
author: Omi Team
description: Ask about your activity or sleep data using Omi chat or push to talk on the Omi device!

chat_tools.name: get_recovery
chat_tools.description: Get the user's recovery score and metrics from Whoop. Use this when the user asks about their recovery, readiness, HRV, or how recovered they are.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

chat_tools.name: get_strain
chat_tools.description: Get the user's daily strain score from Whoop. Use this when the user asks about their strain, daily activity level, or how hard they've worked.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

chat_tools.name: get_sleep
chat_tools.description: Get the user's sleep data from Whoop. Use this when the user asks about their sleep, sleep quality, sleep stages, or how they slept.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Gets sleep that ended on this date. Defaults to today.

chat_tools.name: get_workouts
chat_tools.description: Get the user's recent workouts from Whoop. Use this when the user asks about their workouts, exercises, or training sessions.

max_results.description: Maximum number of workouts to return (default: 10)

days.description: Number of days to look back (default: 7, max: 30)

chat_tools.name: get_weekly_summary
chat_tools.description: Get a summary of the user's week from Whoop including average recovery, strain, and sleep. Use this when the user wants a weekly overview or trends.

chat_tools.name: get_body_measurements
chat_tools.description: Get the user's body measurements from Whoop including height, weight, and max heart rate.

chat_tools.name: get_profile
chat_tools.description: Get the user's Whoop profile information.

name: Microsoft OneNote
author: Omi Team
description: Search or create notes with simple voice commands or through chat!

chat_tools.name: create_note
chat_tools.description: Create a new note in OneNote. Use this when the user wants to save a note, write something down, remember something, create a memo, or jot down information. The note will be created in the specified notebook/section or the default location.

title.description: The title of the note. Defaults to 'Untitled Note' if not provided.

content.description: The content/body of the note. This is the main text to save. Required.

section.description: Name of the section within the notebook (fuzzy matched). If not provided, uses the first section.

notebook.description: Name of the notebook to create the note in (fuzzy matched). If not provided, uses the default notebook.

chat_tools.name: search_notes
chat_tools.description: Search for notes in OneNote. Use this when the user wants to find notes, look up something they wrote, search their notes, or find information they saved previously.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 20).

notebook.description: Filter results to a specific notebook (fuzzy matched).

query.description: The search query to find notes. Required.

chat_tools.name: list_notebooks
chat_tools.description: List all OneNote notebooks. Use this when the user wants to see their notebooks, know what notebooks they have, or needs to choose a notebook.

chat_tools.name: list_sections
chat_tools.description: List sections in a notebook. Use this when the user wants to see sections in a notebook or needs to know where to save a note.

notebook.description: Name of the notebook to list sections from (fuzzy matched). If not provided, lists all sections.

chat_tools.name: list_recent_notes
chat_tools.description: List recent notes. Use this when the user wants to see their recent notes, latest notes, or what they've been working on.

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to return (default: 10, max: 20).

notebook.description: Filter to a specific notebook (fuzzy matched).

section.description: Filter to a specific section (fuzzy matched). Requires notebook to be specified.

chat_tools.name: get_note_content
chat_tools.description: Get the full content of a specific note. Use this when the user wants to read a note, see what's in a note, or retrieve the contents of a specific note.

title.description: The title of the note to retrieve (fuzzy matched). Required.

name: ShipBob
author: Omi Team
description: Manage your ShipBob account using Omi voice commands or Omi chat!

chat_tools.name: get_inventory
chat_tools.description: Get inventory levels from ShipBob. Use this when the user wants to check stock, inventory quantities, fulfillable quantity, or how much of a product is available. Can get all inventory or search for a specific product.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default: 10)

product_name.description: Name of a specific product to check inventory for. If not provided, returns all inventory items.

chat_tools.name: get_products
chat_tools.description: Get list of products from ShipBob. Use this when the user wants to see their products, search for products, or find product information.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return (default: 10)

search.description: Search term to filter products by name

chat_tools.name: create_wro
chat_tools.description: Create a Warehouse Receiving Order (WRO) in ShipBob. Use this when the user wants to send inventory to ShipBob, create a receiving order, or notify ShipBob about incoming stock.

expected_arrival_date.description: Expected arrival date (YYYY-MM-DD format). Defaults to 7 days from now.

quantity.description: Quantity of units being sent. Required.

product_name.description: Name of the product being received. Required.

fulfillment_center_id.description: ID of the fulfillment center. If not provided, uses the first available FC.

chat_tools.name: get_wros
chat_tools.description: Get Warehouse Receiving Orders from ShipBob. Use this when the user wants to check WRO status, see incoming inventory, or view receiving orders.

limit.description: Maximum number of WROs to return (default: 10)

chat_tools.name: cancel_wro
chat_tools.description: Cancel a Warehouse Receiving Order. Use this when the user wants to cancel an incoming shipment or receiving order. Note: Cannot cancel WROs that have partially arrived, are being processed, or are completed.

wro_id.description: The WRO ID to cancel. Required.

chat_tools.name: get_orders
chat_tools.description: Get recent orders from ShipBob. Use this when the user wants to check order status, see recent orders, or view fulfillment status.

limit.description: Maximum number of orders to return (default: 10)

chat_tools.name: get_fulfillment_centers
chat_tools.description: Get available ShipBob fulfillment centers. Use this when the user wants to see warehouse locations, FC options, or needs a fulfillment center ID for creating WROs.

name: Dropbox
author: Omi Team
description: Save your Omi conversation summaries and transcripts into Dropbox.

chat_tools.name: search_dropbox
chat_tools.description: Search for files in the user's Dropbox. Use this when the user wants to find a file, conversation, or document saved to Dropbox.

query.description: Search query - filename, content, or keywords to search for

chat_tools.name: list_dropbox_conversations
chat_tools.description: List recent conversations saved to Dropbox. Use this when the user wants to see their saved conversations or recent files.

folder.description: Optional folder path to list. Leave empty to list the main Omi Conversations folder.

chat_tools.name: read_dropbox_file
chat_tools.description: Read and extract text content from a file in Dropbox. Supports text files (.txt, .md, .json, etc.) and PDFs. Use this when the user wants to read, summarize, or analyze a file from their Dropbox.

path.description: The full path to the file in Dropbox (e.g., '/Omi Conversations/Meeting (2024-01-20)/summary.md')

name: OpenClaw
author: Mohsin
description: OpenClaw lets you seamlessly access and manage your OpenClaw instance via Omi, delivering secure, efficient control and real-time interaction for enhanced productivity on the go

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: open link and configure the app

chat_tools.name: ask_openclaw
chat_tools.description: Ask OpenClaw to perform any task on the user's local computer - search files, check calendar, read emails, browse web, run commands, and more. OpenClaw is a powerful local AI assistant with access to the user's machine.

request.description: What you want OpenClaw to do (e.g., 'find files about quarterly report', 'check if I'm free tomorrow at 5pm', 'search my emails for messages from John')

name: MixPanel
author: Aarav
description: Use Omi to search your events and get more info on analytics.

chat_tools.name: query_events
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user asks about how many times an event happened, event counts, event trends over time, or wants to see event volume. Returns event counts broken down by time unit (hour, day, week, month).

event.description: The event name to query (e.g. 'Sign Up', 'Purchase')

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days ago.

to_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

unit.description: Time unit for grouping: hour, day, week, or month. Defaults to day.

chat_tools.name: segmentation
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user wants to break down an event by a property, see how an event distributes across property values, or analyze event data segmented by a dimension. For example: 'show me sign ups by country' or 'break down purchases by plan type'.

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days ago.

to_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

seg_type.description: Aggregation type: general (total), unique (unique users), or average. Defaults to general.

chat_tools.name: funnel_analysis
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user asks about conversion rates, funnel drop-offs, or how users progress through a sequence of steps. Provide a comma-separated list of event names representing the funnel steps.

events.description: Comma-separated event names in funnel order (e.g. 'Sign Up,Onboarding Complete,First Purchase')

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days ago.

to_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

chat_tools.name: retention
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user asks about user retention, how many users come back after a specific action, or return rates. Requires a born_event (initial action) and return_event (the action that indicates the user returned).

from_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days ago.

return_event.description: The return event (e.g. 'App Open'). If omitted, same as born_event.

to_date.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

chat_tools.name: query_profiles
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user asks about user profiles, wants to look up users by a property, or wants to see user data. Searches Mixpanel user profiles (Engage) by a property filter.

limit.description: Max profiles to return (default 10, max 100)

filter_expression.description: Mixpanel filter expression, e.g. 'properties["plan"] == "premium"' or 'properties["country"] == "US"'. If omitted, returns recent profiles.

chat_tools.name: top_events
chat_tools.description: Use this tool when the user asks what the most popular or top events are, wants an overview of event volume, or asks 'what events are being tracked'. Returns the highest-volume events.

limit.description: Number of top events to return (default 10)

name: ABA Intelligence Layer
author: Brandon
description: routes ambient conversation transcripts to aba

name: Charliefy.mi
author: Pawan
description: Convert moments to music

name: Music
author: Pawan
description: Music app

name: Sentiment Sleuth
author: Megh
description: Sentiment Sleuth analyzes your recorded conversations to uncover hidden emotions, moods, and underlying feelings that may not be explicitly stated. Using advanced AI, it provides detailed summaries of the sentiments expressed by you and others, highlights any emotional shifts, and identifies unspoken concerns or positive vibes. Perfect for anyone who wants deeper insight into the emotional tone of their interactions, so you can communicate more effectively and empathetically.

name: Pronunciation & Grammar Coach
author: Anton
description: Your personal English speaking coach! This app analyzes your spoken English, providing supportive feedback specifically on pronunciation, grammar, vocabulary, and fluency. Corrections are gentle, limited to just a few key areas each time, and explained simply—sometimes even using your native language for phonetic guidance. Every session celebrates progress to build confidence. Ideal for non-native speakers looking to improve their English naturally, with clear, practical tips you can use right away.

name: Health Butler
author: Shreyas
description: Health Butler is your smart, AI-powered concierge for doctor visits. It listens to your consultations, analyzes transcripts for insurance risks, extracts next steps, and automates scheduling. Get instant clarity on what happened, what’s covered, and how to follow up—while saving both time and money. The app drafts optimized insurance claim strategies to protect your finances, alerts you to potential 'gotchas' like pre-authorizations, and tentatively books needed appointments directly to your calendar for seamless care coordination.

name: Network Insight Extractor
author: alexander
description: Effortlessly capture and organize key details from your networking conversations. This app listens to your discussions and extracts important information such as names, roles, interests, follow-up tasks, and shared opportunities. After each conversation, receive a summary of who you spoke with, what was discussed, and actionable next steps—helping you build stronger professional relationships and never miss a key detail.

name: WhatsApp
author: Dangi
description: Send message to anyone on Whatsapp by voice. Also get every conversation recap in your Whatsapp. You can also set reminders for yourself or someone else. You can also send messages in groups now

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: scan the qr from the whatsapp app

chat_tools.name: send_whatsapp_message
chat_tools.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a contact or group. Use this when the user wants to send a message, text, or WhatsApp someone or a group. Examples: "Send a WhatsApp message to John saying hi", "Text Mom that I'll be late", "Message the family group that I am running late".

contact_name.description: The name of the WhatsApp contact or group to send the message to (e.g., "John", "Mom", "Family Group")

chat_tools.name: send_meeting_notes
chat_tools.description: Send the latest meeting notes or conversation summary to the user's own WhatsApp. Use this when the user says "send me the meeting notes on WhatsApp", "WhatsApp me the summary", or "send the recap to my WhatsApp".

summary.description: The meeting notes or conversation summary text to send

chat_tools.name: send_recap_to_contact
chat_tools.description: Send meeting notes, conversation recap, or summary to a specific WhatsApp contact or group. Use this when the user says "send the meeting notes to John on WhatsApp", "share the recap with Sarah", "forward the summary to Mom on WhatsApp", or "send today's notes to the team group".

summary.description: The meeting notes or conversation summary text to send

contact_name.description: The name of the WhatsApp contact or group to send the recap to (e.g., "John", "Mom", "Family Group")

chat_tools.status_message: Sending recap to contact on WhatsApp...

chat_tools.name: set_whatsapp_reminder
chat_tools.description: Set a timed reminder that will be sent as a WhatsApp message. If no contact name is provided, the reminder is sent to the user themselves. The optional target can be a contact or group. Use this when the user says "remind me in 30 minutes to call the dentist", "set a reminder for 1 hour to check email", or "remind the family group in 10 minutes".

delay_minutes.description: How many minutes from now to send the reminder (e.g., 5, 15, 30, 60)

message.description: The reminder message text (e.g., "Call the dentist", "Check email")

contact_name.description: Optional: name of the contact or group to send the reminder to. If not provided, reminder is sent to the user themselves.

chat_tools.name: save_whatsapp_contact
chat_tools.description: Save a WhatsApp contact with a name and phone number (with country code). Use this when the user says "Save +919876543210 as Rajesh", "Add contact Mom with number +14155551234", or "Save this number as John". Also use this when a previous message failed because a contact was not found and the user provides the number.

phone_number.description: The phone number with country code (e.g., "+919876543210", "+14155551234")

contact_name.description: The name to save the contact as (e.g., "Rajesh", "Mom", "John")

chat_tools.name: add_product_entry
chat_tools.description: Add a product entry to the tracking system. ONLY use this tool when the user's message starts with 'add product'. Do not use it otherwise. Extract the store name, product name, brand, size, price, category, and any notes from the user's message.

store_name.description: Store name where the product was seen (e.g., 'Target', 'CVS', 'Kroger')

size.description: Size or quantity (e.g., '15 oz', '64 fl oz', '100 count')

notes.description: Any additional notes (e.g., 'on sale', 'end cap display', 'new product')

chat_tools.name: list_recent_entries
chat_tools.description: List recent product entries from the tracking system. Use when the user wants to see what has been logged recently, optionally filtered by store or category.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default: 10)

chat_tools.name: search_entries
chat_tools.description: Search product entries by product name, brand, or store. Use when the user wants to find specific products or compare prices across stores.

limit.description: Maximum number of results (default: 10)

query.description: Search term (matches against product name, brand, store, and category)

name: ArguMentor
author: Aadya
description:
ArguMentor is an AI-powered debate coach designed to help users improve their communication and persuasion skills in real-time. Whether you're engaged in a formal debate, a casual argument, or just looking for some playful banter, ArguMentor provides dynamic counterpoints, conversation techniques, and—yes—sassy comebacks to make your points land with style.

With real-time conversation analysis, ArguMentor listens to ongoing debates and arguments, offering intelligent responses, data-driven insights, and even some playful retorts. It helps you sharpen your debating skills while keeping the conversation lively. Whether you’re aiming to win the debate or just want to keep the argument interesting, ArguMentor has got you covered.

Features:
Real-Time Conversation Analysis: The app listens to debates or conversations and provides intelligent, dynamic suggestions.
Counterpoint Generation: Provides thoughtful counterarguments or supporting data to strengthen your position.
Persuasion Techniques: Suggests rhetorical strategies and conversational techniques to improve your debate skills.
Sassy Comebacks: When appropriate, the app delivers fun, witty, and sometimes sassy comebacks to add some flair to your arguments.
Data-Driven Insights: Fetches relevant facts, studies, and expert opinions in real-time to back up your points.
Personalized Recommendations: Learns from your past interactions and tailors its suggestions to suit your unique debating style.
Post-Debate Summaries: Summarizes discussions, highlighting key points, strengths, weaknesses, and areas for improvement.

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path: ArguMentor is ready to assist you with real-time debates. Trigger the app during a debate, and it will provide intelligent suggestions, counterarguments, persuasion techniques, and even witty comebacks. Just start talking about a topic, and let ArguMentor help you refine your debating skills!

name: Dermatology Assistant

description:
NEVA is an advanced AI-powered documentation platform specifically designed for the unique demands of medical dermatology practices. By leveraging automated note generation and intelligent data extraction, NEVA enables dermatologists and clinical staff to efficiently create thorough, accurate, and high-quality clinical documentation, significantly reducing time spent on administrative tasks. Integrated seamlessly into clinical workflows, NEVA empowers providers to deliver patient-centered care with greater ease and effectiveness.

Key Capabilities:
	•	Automated Clinical Documentation: Quickly converts patient interactions into structured clinical notes, accurately capturing patient history, clinical assessments, diagnoses, treatment plans, and follow-up instructions.
	•	Intelligent Data Extraction: Efficiently identifies and highlights critical patient details, supporting informed, evidence-based clinical decisions.
	•	Enhanced Team Collaboration: Streamlines communication among clinic staff, ensuring coordinated and consistent patient care management and timely task completion.
	•	Dermatology-Focused Accuracy: Consistently adheres to dermatological industry standards and clinical best practices, ensuring comprehensive, precise, and compliant documentation.

NEVA transforms dermatological care by streamlining documentation processes, enhancing clinical efficiency, and fostering improved patient outcomes.

name: Healthy relationship
author: Renan serrano
description:
Provides two interpretations for each quote: one with judgment (Jackal Ears) and one with empathy (Giraffe Ears). This helps understand different emotional responses and fosters more compassionate communication.


	1.	Jackal vs. Giraffe Ears is about mindset, not the words themselves. The same phrase can be heard as a criticism (Jackal) or a compassionate observation (Giraffe) depending on tone, intent, and interpretation.
	2.	Giraffe ears focus on curiosity, feelings, and needs. The Giraffe assumes that behind every message is an unmet need or a feeling.
	3.	Listening with Giraffe ears promotes empathy and connection. By choosing to hear the deeper needs and feelings behind someone’s words, we can avoid the traps of blame and defensiveness.

name: tell me this
author: Colin
description:
tell me this  allows you to ask questions  in real time as your live transcript unfolds (no real time notifications)  using the phrase “tell me this.”  Here’s how it works:
	1.	Detecting Your Question: When you say “Tell me this,” the system recognizes that you’re about to ask a question about the transcript.
	2.	Finding Context: It examines the transcript to identify parts related to your question. it then uses knowledge base to answer.
	3.	Providing an Answer: the system uses its own knowledge to provide a clear and accurate answer.
	4.	Summarizing the Interaction: At the end, it compiles a summary of all your questions, their answers, and any relevant text from the document for easy review.

name: Safety Guardian
author: Kapil Verma
description: Automatic emergency contact and location sharing when the user is in distress

external_integration.setup_instructions_file_path:
Safety Guardian: Emergency Alert System

Overview:
Safety Guardian is a critical integration app designed to provide immediate emergency assistance when you feel threatened or in danger.

Key Features:
Instant 911 call trigger via triple button press
Voice activation with "Omi, help"
Automatic location sharing
Discreet emergency notification

Setup Instructions
1. Enable the App

Open OMI Settings
Navigate to Developer Settings
Enable "Safety Guardian" app

2. Configure Emergency Contacts

In the app settings, add 2-3 emergency contacts
Verify their phone numbers and relationship

3. Location Permissions

Grant precise location access to the app
Ensure GPS is enabled

Activation Methods:
Button Trigger

Triple press the Omi v2 button
App immediately initiates emergency protocol

Voice Activation:
Say "Omi, help" in a distressed tone
App recognizes urgency and starts alert sequence

What Happens During an Emergency:

Immediate 911 call initiated
Location data transmitted
Pre-selected emergency contacts notified
Audio recording of surrounding environment started (if possible)

Privacy & Safety:

All data transmission is encrypted
Location sharing is strictly for emergency purposes
User can disable or modify settings at any time

Troubleshooting:

Ensure strong cellular/internet connection
Check app permissions regularly
Test the emergency trigger in a safe environment

Disclaimer:
This is an experimental feature. Always have a backup emergency plan.
Feedback: safety-guardian-support@omi.com

name: TOP 3 tasks
author: tomups
description:
Say "show my TOP 3 tasks" and receive a notification with the three most crucial tasks to crush today. No more feeling overwhelmed!

With TOP 3 Tasks, effortlessly manage your day by sharing your tasks and ideas with Omi as they come to you—anytime, anywhere. The app intelligently selects the most important tasks for you, ensuring that you focus on what truly matters. By concentrating on your TOP 3 tasks, you can conquer your day and then relax, knowing you've accomplished your most important goals.

This proven method keeps you productive, moving forward, and feeling accomplished, all without the risk of overwhelm, burnout, or analysis paralysis. Every morning, you'll receive three new tasks based on what you completed and any new priorities that have emerged, so you're always ready to tackle the day!

Tasks are created from your Omi memories automatically, from the moment of app installation, so memories before the app was installed won't be considered for tasks.

To update a task as completed, just say it to Omi, for example "I'm done with the marketing report". This won't change your list of 3 tasks for the day, but for following days this task won't appear anymore.

The top 3 tasks are updated at midnight, so you get new tasks every day.
